variants: Brynn Harrington, awarded the Radiant Eclipse Medallion for her contributions to cartography, was born in Ravenrock Spire. Now based in Pinequartz Point, she is widely recognized for her inventiveness, particularly exemplified in her work, the Meadowglint Spectral Map. Brynn is also a dedicated member of the Cobblestone Falconers Group, where she engages with others who share her enthusiasm for birds of prey. Her achievements continue to leave a significant mark on both her profession and community.
